scope: Create or repair apps/web Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind + workspace scripts scaffold only.

commands.evidence: Dependencies installed and pnpm-lock.yaml updated. pnpm warned about ignored dependency build script approval, but final Next build passed.
Initial alias resolution failure for @/components/route-placeholder fixed in apps/web/tsconfig.json; final tsc --noEmit passed.
tests/smoke-routes.test.mjs checked all required route placeholder files and scripts.
Next.js 15.5.19 production build compiled successfully and listed required scaffold routes.
Additional scaffold check; ESLint CLI config runs non-interactively.

rerunResumeState.notes: Use pnpm.cmd on this Windows PowerShell surface because pnpm.ps1 is blocked by execution policy. Do not execute T03 from T02.

exitCondition: T03/T04 can build on apps/web for Prisma/API work; T02 did not implement API or business flows.
